default.title: Helpful Tip
default.body: Use the guidance on each page to move through your observation with confidence.

steps.title: Choose a domain
steps.body: Start by selecting the broad learning area that best matches what you observed.

steps.title: Refine the focus
steps.body: Pick the subdomain that gives the clearest match for the child’s learning context.

steps.title: Select an element
steps.body: Choose the element that most closely reflects the specific skill, behaviour, or capability you noticed.

steps.title: Match the behaviour
steps.body: Compare the listed behaviours and select the one that best represents the child’s current progress.

steps.title: Capture the observation
steps.body: Complete the statement with concise notes that describe what the child did, said, or demonstrated.

steps.title: Review before saving
steps.body: Check the selected pathway and notes to make sure the observation is accurate and ready to keep or export.
